title.en: After a long time, the entire green tree was ex...

content.en:
After a long time, the entire green tree was extracted.

And this green tree in ruins is also equivalent to being scrapped, completely useless.

Next, Ye Tian built another Eternal Ruin Divine Array, even if the Eternal Ruins Divine Array was not of much help to him, but if it was with the help of Mixed Ruin Blue Liquid, the effect would definitely be very good.

This time, Ye Tian's goal was not high, that is, to use these chaotic ruins to comprehend the origin rules of the other side to the ninety percent five realm.

Grunt.

Ye Tian took a sip of the mixed ruin green liquid and began to comprehend the origin rules of the other side.

"The effect is really good, and it is strange that I have to pay attention to the Qingshu who has been trying to get rid of the ruins in the Origin Upper Realm. If they find that the green trees in the ruins are gone, they will be surprised!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

When Ye Tian comprehended and cultivated the Origin Rules of the other side, some Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors in the central part united and came to the Nine Dragons Sea Mountain.

Kowloon Seamount.

Thirteen Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors came, one of them was the Lord of the Blood Night, they were all with top-notch Origin Upper Realm combat power, and they finally joined forces to cooperate, preparing to deal with the Blue Scale Dragon of the Nine Dragons Sea Mountain.

Moreover, they have also prepared a lot of hole cards and big killers, hoping to kill the green scale dragon, even if they can't kill it, they can find another way!

They didn't snatch the Chaos Ruins Green Tree for themselves, if it was just for themselves, after so many Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors were divided, there wouldn't be much Chaos Ruins Green Liquid, which would not help them much.

They chose to join forces mainly for the sake of their juniors.

However.

When they came to Jiulong Haishan, they were directly dumbfounded.

"Where's the Green Scale Dragon?"

They saw only traces of the battle, as well as fragments of the corpse of the green scale dragon, proving that a great battle had broken out here.

But the breath was erased, time and space were erased, and they couldn't see the past plane, and they couldn't know what was going on here.

"The green trees in the ruins are gone!"

The Lord of the Bloody Night frowned.

They are still too late, there must be other Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors who have come here, and there may be quite a few of them, and they have joined forces to kill these green scale dragons.

They didn't think that the Origin Upper Realm Overlord was interested in killing the Green Scale Dragon, it could only be done by a group of top Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors like them.

But there aren't many top-level Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors in the middle, if other top-level Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors have action, they should know about it.

However, they haven't actually heard of it.

The chaotic green trees were gone, and their improvised team had to be disbanded.

And who took the green tree of the ruins has become a mystery.

......

Wind Tooth Island.

Passage of time passed.

Ye Tian had been comprehending the Origin Rules of the Other Shore, and after consuming a large amount of Mixed Ruins Green Liquid, his Origin Rules of the Other Shore showed signs of breaking through.

Airplanes!!!!

When Ye Tian comprehended the origin rules of the other side, he suddenly broke the shackles, and the power of the origin rules of the other side exploded, and the origin of the other side was also skyrocketing.

He knew that his other side origin had broken through from the ninety-four-fourth realm to the ninety-fifth-realm realm.

"Finally a breakthrough!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited!

After the Origin Rules of the other side reach the realm of ninety percent and four, it is extremely difficult to go further!

It's like the Lord of Ice and Rain, and now the Origin Rules on the other side are only ninety percent of the four realms, and they have been surpassed by him.

Even the Lord of the Cave and the Lord of the Qin Sound of the Wind Tooth Island, it seems that the origin rules on the other side are only ninety percent of the four realms, and only the other side of the origin rules of the Lord of the Wind Teeth have reached the ninety percent of the five realms.

As for the Ninety Percent Six Origin Rules on the other side, there is currently no Origin Upper Realm on Fengya Island that has reached this level.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian went to test the origin of the other side.

16.2 million

This means that Ye Tian's other side of the origin has directly skyrocketed by nearly 6 million, and this is just to raise the other side of the origin rule realm by one point, the increase in the other side of the origin is so big!

"If I directly raise the Origin Rule of the Other Shore to the Ninety Percent Seven Realm, I should be able to directly break through to the Origin Late Realm realm!" Ye Tian estimated.

But if you want to raise the Origin Rules of the other side to the ninety-seven-level realm, the difficulty is too terrifying, even more difficult than becoming the peak of the Origin Realm.

The peak cultivation of the Origin Realm, relying on the long years of slow penance cultivation and step by step improvement, can still be improved.

But the Origin Rule of the other side has reached the realm of ninety percent and seven, which is not something that can be achieved by penance!

......

This time, the origin of the other side skyrocketed, and Ye Tian was in a very good mood.

He was going to find some more resources to improve his other roots.

But there are very few resources in the Origin Black River that can help him, and there are not many opportunities like Chaos Blue Liquid.

However, there are many opportunities in the central region, but it is easy to offend the hegemon-level forces in the central region.

Once you offend the overlord-level forces, even Wind Tooth Island will be involved.

Under normal circumstances, no one would dare to do this.

"I can go to the central part of the country to grab resources, as long as I don't use my identity!"

Ye Tian thought of the identity of one person, that is, the Lord of the Blood Night.

He has a conflict with the Lord of the Blood Night, and he can completely frame the Lord of the Blood Night!

When the time comes, people are looking for trouble, and they are also looking for the Lord of the Blood Night, but they won't look for him!

"That's a great idea!"

Thereupon.

Ye Tian sent a replica body to the central part of the country, and by the way, he inquired about the information in the middle of the country.

......

Central.

The Green Tooth Giant City.

Ye Tian came here, lived here for a while, and then inquired about the news through the Xuanyin Pavilion and bought some information, so as to understand the distribution of some resources.

Many Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors would buy this kind of information, and it would not attract attention.

Gradually, Ye Tian knew where there were treasure resources that were of great use to the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

After some selection, he decided to go to Zhonghaiyuan.

Zhonghaiyuan is a treasure land in the middle of the land of eternity, located in the Tianhai Mountain area, and Tianhai Mountain belongs to the Chaotian Holy Mountain, the central overlord-level force.

Except for the members of Tianhai Mountain and Chaotian Holy Mountain, other members are not allowed to enter Zhonghaiyuan to look for opportunities.

Of course.

Zhonghai Yuan is also relatively dangerous, even if it is a top-level Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor, there is a risk of falling!

"The cultivation of the Lord of the Blood Night is not too high, but the Origin Rules of the Other Side have comprehended the Ninety Percent Six Realm, and in addition, he has also created a lot of top-notch Top-of-the-Line Techniques, and his combat power can reach the top Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor combat power. I should be able to replicate his body, but I just can't exert his combat power!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently.

He tried to replicate it, and sure enough, it worked.

Immediately after, Ye Tian infiltrated the Zhonghai Abyss as the Lord of the Blood Night.
